scope_summary.problem: Three largest test coverage gaps in jet: CSS output not validated, dev server module graph barely tested, code splitting multi-entry untested.
scope_summary.success_criteria: New Rust #[test] functions covering CSS output validation, module graph invalidation/HMR boundaries, and multi-entry code splitting.

boundary.in_scope: Unit tests in css/, dev_server/, bundler/ modules
boundary.out_of_scope: No production code changes, no E2E tests, no new features
boundary.constraints: Tests only — all existing tests must continue passing
